articles.title: Trellix Source Code Repository Breached
articles.summary: The cybersecurity firm’s investigation has not found any impact on its source code release or distribution process. The post Trellix Source Code Repository Breached appeared first on SecurityWeek.

articles.title: Educational company Infrastructure reports cyber incident
articles.summary: By Saturday, Infrastructure’s chief information security officer Steve Proud confirmed that the hackers gained access to information about users at some educational institutions, including names, email addresses, student ID numbers and messages between users.

articles.summary: Fraudsters aren't hacking credit unions, they are exploiting normal business processes. Flare reveals how structured loan fraud methods use stolen identities to pass verification and secure funds. [...]

articles.summary: Polymarket is a platform where people can bet on real-world events, political and otherwise. articles.title: Story retracted
articles.summary: BleepingComputer initially published a story about a new data breach at Instructure. Shortly after publication, we determined that the information was incorrect and primarily based on outdated details from a prior incident. The article has been retracted, and we regret the error. articles.summary: Incident responders at Rapid7 said successful exploitation of CVE-2026-41940 “grants an attacker control over the cPanel host system, its configurations and databases, and websites it manages.”

articles.title: Cyber incident responders who carried out ransomware attacks given 4-year sentences
articles.summary: Two cybersecurity incident responders who abused their positions to carry out covert ransomware attacks were sentenced to four years in prison.

articles.title: British cyber agency warns of looming ‘patch wave’ as AI speeds flaw discovery
articles.summary: Britain’s cyber agency warned that organizations should prepare for a surge of urgent software updates as artificial intelligence accelerates the discovery of security flaws, raising the risk of widespread exploitation.

articles.title: Cyber spies target Russian aviation firms to steal satellite and GPS data
articles.summary: A cyber-espionage group has been targeting Russian government agencies and companies in the aviation industry to steal sensitive geospatial data.

articles.summary: Security researchers and European cybersecurity officials are urging administrators to address the risk posed by a newly discovered security flaw that has been hiding in the Linux operating system for nearly a decade.

articles.title: Hackers earning millions from hijacked cargo, FBI says
articles.summary: In an advisory this week, FBI officials said cyber actors have spent the last two years breaking into the systems of brokers and carriers — allowing them to pose as victim companies and post fraudulent listings on freight delivery message boards.
